name: CFTR 317kb TAD (ENCODE CTCF + literature enhancers)
description: 317kb window spanning the CFTR TAD on chr7. CTCF boundaries from ENCODE K562 ChIP-seq (ENCFF660GHM, IDR narrowPeak) — CTCF boundaries are cell-type invariant (Smith 2016). Enhancer occupancy estimated from airway/intestinal literature (Gosalia 2020, Ott 2009, Blackledge 2009), NOT from K562 (CFTR is silent in K562). Occupancy values are LITERATURE-based estimates, marked accordingly.

enhancers.name: intron1_DHS
enhancers.note: DNase I hypersensitive site in intron 1. Ott 2009 (PMC2785270)

enhancers.name: intron11_DHS
enhancers.note: DNase I hypersensitive site in intron 11. Ott 2009 (PMC2785270)

enhancers.name: plus6_8kb_DHS
enhancers.note: 3' DNase I hypersensitive site +6.8kb from CDS. Blackledge 2009 (PMC2651798)

ctcf_sites.name: 5prime_TAD_boundary
ctcf_sites.note: 5' boundary of CFTR TAD. Strongest signal. Smith 2016 -80.1kb site

ctcf_sites.name: enhancer_blocker
ctcf_sites.note: Enhancer blocker -20.9kb from CFTR TSS. Blackledge 2007

ctcf_sites.name: 3prime_insulator_proximal
ctcf_sites.note: Proximal 3' insulator element downstream of CFTR CDS

ctcf_sites.name: 3prime_TAD_boundary
ctcf_sites.note: 3' boundary of CFTR TAD. Smith 2016 +48.9kb site

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 317x317 matrix. SSIM thresholds from 30kb HBB config will be diluted at this resolution — requires empirical recalibration after first CFTR run.
